AiContractColumnProfile.description: Observed profile of one column, as reported by `rocky ai-contract`.

observed_values.description: Observed low-cardinality domain. Empty above the cardinality cap. This is reported as evidence; it is not encoded into the contract file.

description:
JSON output for `rocky ai-contract <model>`.

Reports the AI-drafted data contract for a model, grounded in the observed per-column profile of its target table. The drafted contract is compile-verified against the model before it's reported, so a successful response is a contract that `rocky compile` accepts.

attempts.description: Number of LLM attempts taken to reach a compile-verified contract.

model.description: The model the contract was drafted for.

profile.description: The observed per-column profile that grounded the draft.

saved_path.description: Path the contract was written to, when `--save` was passed.

title: AiContractOutput
